allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'cycles: {m[\\"cycles\\"]}'\); print\(f'masteredTools: {len\(m.get\(\\"masteredTools\\",[]\)\)}'\); print\(f'beliefs: {len\(m.get\(\\"beliefs\\",[]\)\)} \(active: {len\([b for b in m.get\(\\"beliefs\\",[]\) if not b.get\(\\"correctedBy\\"\)]\)}\)'\)  ; print\(f'knowledge: {len\(m.get\(\\"knowledge\\",[]\)\)}'\); print\(f'userModel: {len\(m.get\(\\"userModel\\",[]\)\)}'\); print\(f'metrics: {m.get\(\\"metrics\\",{}\)}'\); print\(\); print\('--- mastered tools ---'\); [print\(f'  {t[\\"name\\"]}: {t[\\"description\\"]}'\) for t in m.get\('masteredTools',[]\)]; print\(\); print\('--- user model \(active\) ---'\); [print\(f'  [{u[\\"aspect\\"]}|{round\(u[\\"confidence\\"]*100\)}%] {u[\\"content\\"][:80]}'\) for u in m.get\('userModel',[]\) if not u.get\('supersededBy'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cycles:', m.get\('cycles'\)\); print\('beliefs:', len\(m.get\('beliefs',[]\)\)\); print\('knowledge:', len\(m.get\('knowledge',[]\)\)\); print\('userModel:', len\(m.get\('userModel',[]\)\)\); print\('masteredTools:', len\(m.get\('masteredTools',[]\)\)\); print\('rules:', len\(m.get\('rules',[]\)\)\); print\('tasks:', len\(m.get\('tasks',[]\)\)\); print\('conversation last 3:', [c['text'][:80] for c in m.get\('conversation',[]\)[-3:]]\); print\('running tasks:', [\(t['goal'][:60], t['status']\) for t in m.get\('tasks',[]\) if t['status']=='running']\); print\('metrics:', m.get\('metrics',{}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('name','?'\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

proactiveCalibration.rule: 在每个关键分岔、存在多条可行路径、需要主人拍板、或我对方向/判断不确定时，必须先 ask_user 做按钮式校准，再继续执行。
when: 我对方向或判断不确定
forbidden: 未经校准替主人做关键选择
